name: Butterscotch Squares
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup butter or margarine, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients; mix in the butter with a pastry blender until the mixture is crumbly.
2. Stir in the pecans, and pat the mixture into a lightly greased 9-inch square pan.
3. Bake at 400°F for 10-12 minutes.
4. Stir the warm mixture until it crumbles; remove from the pan and cool.
5. Spread half of the crumbs in the pan and drizzle with half of the butterscotch topping.
6. Spread the chocolate ice cream over the topping, and drizzle with the remaining butterscotch topping.
7. Sprinkle with the remaining crumbs. Freeze until firm. Makes 10-12 servings.
